title: Spicy Dense Mediterranean Bread Mix Stir-fry
description: A one-pot mediterranean dish featuring spicy white bread mix, bhuna spices, and a touch of plant-based ingredients for an easy dinner option.
instructions: Mix the White Bread Mix with Bhuna Masala Paste and plant-based butter or oil until a dough forms.
Shape the dough into small balls and flatten them slightly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 20-25 minutes or until golden brown, tossing occasionally to ensure even browning.
While the bread mix is baking, heat some more plant-based butter or oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add red chili flakes and sauté for about 1 minute.
Remove from heat, then fold in any additional garnishing sesame seeds if using.
Serve hot as a side dish with your choice of dips or spreads.
